name: Teuken-7B (instruct)
archDisplay: Custom decoder-only transformer with multilingual tokenizer, GQA, RMSNorm, SwiGLU, RoPE
note: EU-funded model pre-trained from scratch and instruction-tuned across all 24 official EU languages; Apache-2.0 commercial variant.
tpsNote: No RTX 4090-specific measurement found; a 7B model at Q4 fits comfortably and typically runs well above real-time on a 4090.
